productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Tops
description: Composition Black sleeveless draped blouson top made of 100% polyester, with a V-neck, half mock collar, and has a slightly crushed look Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 C with mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wring Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Sophistication shines through this black draped blouson top from the united colors of benetton. The slightly crushed look adds charm to this graceful top, making it a must-have in every girl's wardrobe. Team it with sexy black stilettos and a glossy clutch for a chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.8", Chest-33"
